description: Overview do backend portifolio analytics — ingestao, cliques, permanencia e engajamento por pagina. Fonte: InfluxDB measurement page_analytics. Web vitals e custom_events com nome separado nao estao no schema atual — ver ark/docs/dashboard-cliente.md.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "visualizacoes")
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Visualizacoes"})

from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "cliques")
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Cliques"})

from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "scrolls")
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Scrolls"})

from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "hovers")
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Hovers"})

from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "mouse_moves")
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Mouse moves"})

panels.title: Cliques por pagina (1h, soma por janela 5min)
panels.description: Soma de cliques por page_type em janelas de 5min. Group antes de aggregateWindow consolida sessoes diferentes na mesma serie.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "cliques")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Tempo total na pagina (24h, soma de segundos por janela 5min)
panels.description: Soma de permanencia_segundos por janela de 5min e por page_type. permanencia_segundos no SDK e a duracao do batch (~5s), entao soma representa o tempo total agregado de todas as sessoes ativas naquela janela.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics" and r._field == "permanencia_segundos")
  |> group(columns: ["page_type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Engajamento por pagina (24h) — soma por tipo

targets.query:
from(bucket: "portifolio_dev")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site_slug == "${__user.login}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "page_analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cliques" or r._field == "hovers" or r._field == "mouse_moves" or r._field == "toques" or r._field == "exposicoes" or r._field == "custom_events")
  |> group(columns: ["_field", "page_type"])
  |> sum()

title: Portifolio Analytics — Overview
